title: Perp premium z-score mean reversion filter
hypothesis: 当高流动性 perpetual 的 premium index 或 mark/index basis 相对滚动窗口进入极端分位后，如果 funding 与拥挤方向一致但 premium 不再扩张，且波动率、成交量和成本过滤通过，则后续 premium/basis 均值回归可能形成适合分钟级到小时级回放验证的候选信号。

inputs: premium index kline or mark/index-derived basis by exchange, symbol and interval
funding rates aligned to signal windows
perp candles or trade-derived bars for realized volatility and trend filters
trade volume or trade count for liquidity filters
outputs: estimated net edge after fees, slippage and funding
entry_rules: premium_zscore breaches configured positive or negative threshold
premium_zscore shows rollover or recovery instead of continued expansion
funding confirms crowded direction but estimated funding paid remains inside cost budget
realized volatility is below no-trade threshold or has reverted from an extreme window
volume or trade count supports target notional without high leverage
exit_rules: stop threshold is breached by adverse basis expansion
funding or cost estimate makes net edge non-positive
manual review rejects current market conditions

test_plan: 先用 Binance BTCUSDT、ETHUSDT、SOLUSDT USDT perp 的 1m、5m 和 15m 窗口做离线回放。
比较 premium_index_kline 与 mark/index-derived basis 两种价格源的信号一致性。
按滚动 1d、3d、7d lookback 计算 z-score，并做 walk-forward 阈值稳定性测试。
扣除 maker/taker fee、保守滑点和持仓期间 funding，检查 net edge 是否仍为正。
用成交量或 trade count 过滤低流动性窗口，并限制最大持仓时间和连续触发次数。
跨月份、跨 BTC/ETH/SOL 和后续跨 OKX/Bybit/Bitget 检查是否只拟合单一事件。
risk_controls: 不使用高杠杆；研究评分按 1x 名义风险和保守保证金缓冲评估。
设置 no-trade volatility gate，极端波动和挤仓期间不生成候选。
设置 max holding time、stop threshold 和 cooldown，避免连续逆势加仓。
只有 net edge 覆盖手续费、滑点和预期 funding 支付时才输出候选。
只允许离线研究、告警和人工确认；不标记为 production-ready，不触发真实交易。
